tasks.title: Create GitHub repository and baseline hygiene

tasks.title: Finish contracts + C4 alignment
tasks.description: Replace TBD in c4-containers, api_contract, content_contract, state_contract with decisions from PRD/CMS choice.

tasks.title: Law 151 / MENA regional compliance pass
tasks.description: Complete regional_compliance.md tables and checklist; flag any offshore tool.

tasks.title: Spec density gate validation
